tl_items.title: AI Rewires Brains: Tom Slater's Insightful Essay | Pete Matthew posted on the topic | LinkedIn
tl_items.snippet: This is the best thing I’ve read on AI in ages - a brilliant essay by Tom Slater of Scottish Mortgage Investment Trust (whom I’m unable to tag) about how AI is physically rewiring our brains. It is immaculately written, very easy to digest and might be the most important thing you read this year.
